name: Sauteed Plantains & Sweet Potatoes
recipeIngredient: 2 cups Sliced cooked sweet potatoes -or- yams
2 tablespoons Fresh thyme, dill, chervil, or savory, chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large skillet, melt the first 2 tablespoons of butter and cooking oil until hot.
2. Add potatoes, plantains, onion, ham (if desired), and garlic. Stir frequently for about 5 minutes.
3. Add broth. Cover and simmer for 10 minutes or until plantains are tender.
4. Add remaining butter and desired fresh herbs. Season with salt and pepper to taste.
